notes: v1.2.5 — Network resilience and recovery. The release exists to close the 5/1 disaster pattern (long run loses connectivity, session expires, every subsequent row fails). Three new safety nets: (1) Network-aware retry — when a row fails and PestPac is unreachable, BUU now waits for connectivity to come back BEFORE retrying, instead of burning the row's retry budget on a dead network. (2) Automatic re-auth — three triggers: timer-based (configurable, default 120 min), post-outage (after a 10+ min wait), and login-page detection (if BUU lands on PestPac's login page mid-run, it re-authenticates and continues). All three call the same login sequence; never interleaves with row execution. (3) Circuit breaker — after N consecutive errors (configurable, default 20), BUU stops, preserves a checkpoint, and pops a clear alert. Recovery: the resume modal now has three options (Resume / Skip-and-resume / Discard / Dismiss) with a contextual banner explaining why the run stopped, and a 'Retry N failed rows' button appears on completion when any rows failed. UX: Validate page is gone (validation lives inline on the Build page now, with debounced live re-validation as you edit), Build-page chips are drag-only with higher contrast, default row delays are now 0-0 (was 1-3), default error handling is now Retry (Stop is gone), and a new Speed & resilience settings panel exposes selector timeout, page-load mode, retry count, breaker threshold, and re-auth interval. Stop button: both toolbar Stop and pause-panel Stop now use the same clean-shutdown path (no more 'already running' bounce on a fast Run-after-Stop). Excel log enrichment: new columns for Error category, Phase, Step #, Step type, Step label, Field/selector, Attempted value; auto-filter dropdowns on All rows / Errors only / Skipped sheets; new Stopped reason cell in Summary; synthetic timeline entries for login, re-auth, and breaker events appear in All rows interleaved with row entries. Smaller fixes: live UI now shows SKIPPED in amber for retry-exhausted rows (was previously misclassified as FAILED in red), 'remember last upload directory' for the file picker, better column-token chips on the Import page. Backward-compatible: existing flows, profiles, and credentials carry over unchanged.
